title: Education inspection framework: engagement programme
body: "  Education inspection framework engagement programme  In September and October 2025, Ofsted hosted live webinars that set out the main changes to education inspections starting in November 2025.  The programme of webinars for early years, schools, further education and skills and initial teacher education settings were recorded and are available on our YouTube channel.  Regional events will run throughout the autumn term.  Read more in our engagement programme press release.   Early years: renewed inspection framework webinar recordings    Nurseries, pre-schools and other registered early years settings  The webinars took place on:    Tuesday 16 September 2025: 6pm to 7pm   Thursday 18 September 2025: 6pm to 7pm   Thursday 2 October 2025: 6pm to 7pm    Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: nurseries, pre-schools, other registered early years settings    Childminders  The webinar took place on:   Wednesday 17 September 2025: 7pm to 8pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: childminders    Out-of-school providers registered on the Early Years Register  The webinar took place on:   Thursday 18 September 2025: 12pm to 1pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: out-of-school providers registered on the Early Years Register    Schools: renewed inspection framework webinar recordings    Maintained nursery schools  The webinar took place on:   Tuesday 23 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: maintained nursery schools    State-funded primary schools  The webinars took place on:    Tuesday 16 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Thursday 2 October 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Wednesday 15 October 2025: 4pm to 5pm    Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: state-funded primary schools    State-funded secondary schools  The webinars took place on:    Wednesday 17 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Wednesday 1 October 2025: 4pm to 5pm    Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: state-funded secondary schools    Non-association independent schools  The webinar took place on:   Tuesday 30 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: non-association independent schools    University Technical Colleges  The webinar took place on:   Thursday 18 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: University Technical Colleges    Special schools  The webinar took place on:   Thursday 25 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: special schools    Alternative provision  The webinar took place on:   Wednesday 24 September 2025: 4pm to 5pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: alternative provision    Further education and skills: renewed inspection framework webinar recordings    Providers of programmes for young people or those receiving enhanced inspections  The webinar took place on:   Monday 29 September 2025: 1pm to 2pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: providers of programmes for young people or those receiving enhanced inspections    Apprenticeship providers  The webinar took place on:   Wednesday 24 September 2025: 10am to 11am   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: apprenticeship providers    Adult learning providers  The webinar took place on:   Monday 22 September 2025: 11am to 12pm   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: adult learning providers    High needs provision  The webinar took place on:   Tuesday 23 September 2025: 10:30am to 11:30am   Watch webinar recording: Ofsted education inspection framework: high...
